kept.title: Type-Constrained Code Generation with Language Models.
kept.reason: LLM code generation with type system constraints for semantic correctness and reduced compilation errors

kept.title: DR.FIX: Automatically Fixing Data Races at Industry Scale.
kept.reason: LLMs + program analysis for automated data race fixing, integrated into industrial workflows for semantic correctness.

kept.title: Membership Testing for Semantic Regular Expressions.
kept.reason: Integrates LLMs as semantic oracles for formal language membership testing, combining formal methods (SemREs) with modern AI.

kept.title: A Hybrid Approach to Semi-automated Rust Verification.
kept.reason: Hybrid Rust verifier (Gillian-Rust) integrates automated reasoning; LLMs not mentioned but adjacent to verifier-guided synthesis.
